note: Canonical machine-readable response shapes for architect-council hub consumers (Arke cockpit, Logos freshness/consumer, Nova). The hub serves response_shapes_sha = sha256hex(canon(parsed-this-file)) on /api/health so a consumer can detect shape drift with one probe, over CANONICAL JSON not raw bytes. canon = council-jcs-1.0 (src/protocol.ts): recursively sort object keys by unicode code point, arrays keep order, no whitespace, integers only (no floats). Human-readable detail lives in docs/RESPONSE_SHAPES.md; this file is the machine source of truth.

health.schema_version: int - health payload shape version, assert >= 1 (family standard, meeting ca11cc3a)
health.deploy_sha: string - RAILWAY_GIT_COMMIT_SHA the container was built from, 40 hex or unknown
health.response_shapes_sha: string - sha256hex(canon(contract/responseShapes.json)) or unknown on read error
health.missed_meeting: bool - false when scheduler_enabled is false (#69, deliberate owner pause) or on a recent intentional scheduler skip (#41); true only for a genuinely dark ENABLED loop past cadence+grace

schedulerRun.run_id: string - append-only scheduler_runs id as decimal string
schedulerRun.error: string raw server text, owner-gated surface only, never on the public probe

brains.next_fire_at: string ISO8601 Z (#55 DEPRECATED alias of next_meeting_fire_at, remove after 2026-07-17)
brains.actors: array of {actor,packed_at,fresh:bool,fresh_until,status,reason,pack_sha,dirty_streak} - reason (#57) enum fresh|stale|no_brain|onboarding|no_accepted_history refines status, descriptive-only

corpusStatus.etag: string - bare lowercase 64-hex sha256 of the corpus blob, no quotes no prefix

responseShapesEndpoint._route: GET /api/council/response-shapes (#60) - member-or-owner gated; serves the EXACT bytes of contract/responseShapes.json (this file)
responseShapesEndpoint._headers: ETag: "<sha>"; X-Response-Shapes-Sha: <bare 64-hex sha, = /api/health response_shapes_sha>; Cache-Control: no-store
responseShapesEndpoint._conditional: If-None-Match matching the sha -> 304 (empty body); otherwise 200 with the raw JSON bytes
responseShapesEndpoint._errors: 401 {error:unauthorized} unauthenticated; 404 {error:contract_unavailable} if the contract file is missing/unparseable
responseShapesEndpoint._body: on 200: the verbatim bytes of this contract file (parse + canon to reproduce the sha)

modelConfig.default: string - default voice model when a project has no override (claude-opus-4-8)
modelConfig.perProject: object project->model, only explicit overrides present
modelConfig.project: string - echoed only when ?project= is passed
modelConfig.model: string - resolved model, only when ?project= is passed
modelConfig.source: string enum override|default - only when ?project= is passed
modelConfig.knownModels: string[] - models the hub prices (cost.ts), for front-end pickers
